articles.title: The new iPhones have a problem turning back on after the battery runs out

articles.title: The disappearing AI middle class
articles.summary: In 24 hours last week , OpenAI and DeepSeek made opposite bets on what frontier AI is worth. One says it is a closed product that just got more expensive. The other says it is open infrastructure that just got dramatically cheaper. The price gap between the two ends of the market is now wider than it has been in years, and the comfortable middle that most coding agents have been routing through is thinning out. Until last week, you could pick a model on a fairly smooth price-performance curve. There was a top tier, a middle tier, and a budget tier, and most workloads found a comfortable home somewhere on the slope. That curve still exists, but it has stretched. What used to be a continuous gradient now looks more like two clusters with a gap in between, and developers building agents, codi

articles.title: Beyond prompting: How KubeStellar reached 81% PR acceptance with AI agents
articles.summary: The surprise in building KubeStellar Console with coding agents was not the extent of the model’s capabilities, but the heavy lifting the surrounding codebase had to perform. In mid-December, I started building KubeStellar Console from scratch. It’s a multi-cluster management dashboard for Kubernetes, and it sits inside the KubeStellar project in the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF) Sandbox. The stack is Go on the back end, React and TypeScript on the front, and Helm for packaging. No team. Just me and two AI coding agents running in parallel terminal sessions. The first two weeks were the honeymoon that everyone in this space seems to describe. Code came out of the agents faster than I could read it. Things I’d have budgeted three days for showed up in two hours.
articles.title_zh: 超越提示詞：KubeStellar如何利用AI代理達到81%的PR接受率
articles.summary_zh: 使用編碼代理構建KubeStellar Console時的驚人之處不在於模型能力的範圍，而在於周圍代碼庫必須執行的繁重工作。

articles.title: When Semiconductor Materials Misbehave
articles.summary: Key Takeaways Material behavior in production depends on the process context that no development environment can fully replicate. In advanced packaging, the interactions that cross domain boundaries are increasingly where failures originate. The most accurate materials data is also the most commercially sensitive, leaving simulation models calibrated against generic inputs rather than production reality. It’s generally assumed advanced materials will behave the same in the lab as in production, but that assumption is now under serious pressure. Typically, the lab result becomes the spec, which then becomes the baseline for qualification. That, in turn, becomes the standard against which field performance is judged. articles.title: I thought I’d hate this Android launcher inspired by dumb phones, but I was so wrong
articles.summary: I’ve used Android launchers of all shapes and sizes, including those built specifically for multi-screen devices , some that prioritize quick access to widgets , and others with truly curious navigation philosophies . However, my latest subject expands on an idea immortalized by phones of the early 2000s: the T9 keypad. If you’re not sure what that is, open your phone’s dialer right now. See those 10 numbers and accompanying letters? These were originally printed on devices with physical buttons. You’ll still find this layout used on modern dumb phones, as it’s hugely efficient in terms of space utilization and typing experience. But beyond dialer apps, they no longer have a place on touchscreen keyboard smartphones.

articles.title: I used the Google Pixel 10a, and it’s better than the Pixel 10 in 4 ways
articles.summary: The list of major Google Pixel 10a upgrades is short, and the list of minor ones isn’t much longer. Without the best parts of the mainline Pixel 10 series, like the Tensor G5 chipset or built-in Qi2 magnets, the budget Pixel 10a was easy to write off. However, as one of the few 2026 smartphone releases that didn’t come with a price hike, the Pixel 10a’s $500 price alone is enough to keep it relevant. I used the Pixel 10a for weeks, and there’s still a case for buying it over the base-model Pixel 10 — even if you ignore the cost disparity completely. Google’s latest budget Android phone isn’t flashy or particularly exciting, but that’s exactly what makes it great.

articles.title: Rebuilding the data stack for AI
articles.summary: Artificial intelligence may be dominating boardroom agendas, but many enterprises are discovering that the biggest obstacle to meaningful adoption is the state of their data. While consumer-facing AI tools have dazzled users with speed and ease, enterprise leaders are discovering that deploying AI at scale requires something far less glamorous but far more consequential: data infrastructure that is unified, governed, and fit for purpose. That gap between AI ambition and enterprise readiness is becoming one of the defining challenges of this next phase of digital transformation. articles.title: GitHub veteran Brian Douglas launches Paper Compute to fix AI agent infrastructure
articles.summary: “Everyone’s building agents, not enough people are building the systems underneath them,” open source veteran Brian Douglas wrote on LinkedIn last month , as he announced his new company. It’s a claim that, while hard to measure definitively, mostly holds up to scrutiny. Companies are already building and deploying agents to some degree, but the infrastructure behind them is often improvised—part SDK, part cloud plumbing, part internal tooling. The pieces are there, sure, but they haven’t yet settled into anything like a coherent system. articles.summary: Some of the world’s largest technology companies swiftly quashed a California legislative measure that pitted giants like Apple Inc. and Google against smaller rivals, a display of their immense political influence in their home state.
articles.title_zh: Apple、Google 擊敗有利於競爭對手的加州法案
articles.summary_zh: 世界頂級科技公司迅速阻止了一項將 Apple Inc. 和 Google 與小型競爭對手對立的加州立法措施，展示其在家鄉的巨大政治影響力。

articles.title: Qualcomm May Be Working With OpenAI on a Phone, Analysts Says
articles.summary: Qualcomm shares were on the rise Monday morning after an analyst suggested the chipmaker is working with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI on a smartphone. Ed Ludlow reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 分析師稱 Qualcomm 可能與 OpenAI 合作開發手機
articles.summary_zh: 週一上午 Qualcomm 股價上漲，分析師暗示該芯片製造商正與人工智能巨頭 OpenAI 合作開發智慧型手機。

articles.title: Polish TikTok Star Beats MrBeast in Record Cancer Care Campaign
articles.summary: A Polish TikTok personality set a world record for a livestream charity campaign by raising at least 251 million zloty ($69 million) for a foundation helping children with cancer.
articles.title_zh: 波蘭 TikTok 明星超越 MrBeast 創造癌症關懷活動紀錄
articles.summary_zh: 一位波蘭 TikTok 名人通過直播慈善活動創造了世界紀錄，為幫助患癌兒童的基金會募集了至少 2.51 億波蘭茲羅提（6,900 萬美元）。

articles.title: US Stocks Retreat From Record High as Traders Brace for Earnings
articles.summary: US stocks hovered near record highs with small losses on Monday, as investors prepare for a swath of corporate earnings this week while monitorinng efforts to reopen the Strait of Hormuz amid stalled Iran peace talks. A gauge of chip stocks sold off after a historic run.
articles.title_zh: 美股從歷史高點回落，交易者為財報做準備
articles.summary_zh: 美股週一小幅下跌，接近歷史高位，投資者準備迎接本週大量企業財報，同時關注霍爾木茲海峽重開努力和伊朗和平談判停滯。

articles.title: Sequoia and Nvidia Back Ex-DeepMind Researcher’s New AI Startup at $5.1 Billion Value
articles.summary: Former Google DeepMind researcher David Silver has raised $1.1 billion for his new company, Ineffable Intelligence, in the latest example of an artificial intelligence startup securing enormous funds out of the gate.
articles.title_zh: Sequoia 和 Nvidia 支持前 DeepMind 研究員新 AI 新創，估值 51 億美元
articles.summary_zh: 前 Google DeepMind 研究員 David Silver 為其新公司 Ineffable Intelligence 籌集了 11 億美元，這是 AI 新創公司初期獲得巨額融資的最新範例。

articles.title: Microsoft, OpenAI Sever Their Exclusive AI Pact
articles.summary: Microsoft and OpenAI have changed the terms of their deal when it comes to selling products. OpenAI can now pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon. The revenue sharing agreement with Microsoft also changes. Ed Ludlow explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Microsoft、OpenAI 終止獨家 AI 協議
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft 和 OpenAI 改變了產品銷售協議條款，OpenAI 現可與 Amazon 等雲端運算競爭對手合作，與 Microsoft 的收益分享協議也隨之改變。

articles.title: Private Credit Risks Are Misunderstood: Ketchum
articles.summary: Private credit isn’t cracking, it’s separating winners from losers according to Sound Point CEO Steve Ketchum. He joined Bloomberg Open Interest to argue that today’s stress comes from bad deals, not broken markets. He explains why his firm dodged software risk before AI disruption, and reveals why this shakeout could be a massive buying opportunity for disciplined investors. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 私募信貸風險被誤解：Ketchum
articles.summary_zh: Sound Point CEO Steve Ketchum 認為私募信貸並未崩裂，而是在區分贏家和輸家，當前壓力來自不良交易而非市場破裂。

articles.title: OpenAI Breaks Free From Exclusive AI Pact With Microsoft
articles.summary: Microsoft Corp. and OpenAI have agreed to drop the software giant’s exclusive right to sell the startup’s AI models, opening the door for the ChatGPT maker to pursue deals with cloud-computing rivals like Amazon.com Inc.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 脫離與 Microsoft 的獨家 AI 協議
articles.summary_zh: Microsoft Corp. 和 OpenAI 同意放棄軟體巨頭對 OpenAI AI 模型獨家銷售權，允許 ChatGPT 製造商與 Amazon.com Inc. 等雲端運算對手達成交易。

articles.title: NBA Push Into Vegas, Seattle Gains Steam With Potential Bidders
articles.summary: The National Basketball Association has received signs of interest from multiple investor groups for new teams in Las Vegas and Seattle that the league plans to sell for as much as $10 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.
articles.title_zh: NBA 向拉斯維加斯、西雅圖擴展勢頭強勁，潛在競標者增加
articles.summary_zh: 美國職業籃球聯賽已收到多個投資集團對在拉斯維加斯和西雅圖設立新球隊的興趣表示，聯賽計劃以高達 100 億美元的價格出售。

articles.title: What Happens When AIs Work Together?
articles.summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, we are joined by METR's president Chris Painter and technical staff member Joel Becker. They tell Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about the organization's focus on gauging an AI model's capability to do autonomous, complex tasks. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 當 AI 協同工作時會發生什麼？
articles.summary_zh: 在本集 Odd Lots 播客中，METR 主席 Chris Painter 和技術人員 Joel Becker 分享了該組織對衡量 AI 模型自主執行複雜任務能力的關注。

articles.title: Verizon Reports Phone Subscriber Gains Under New CEO
articles.summary: Verizon Communications Inc. surprised analysts Monday when it reported a gain of mobile subscribers, an early signal that new Chief Executive Officer Dan Schulman’s strategy for recapturing market share is already paying off.
articles.title_zh: Verizon 在新任 CEO 帶領下報告手機用戶增長
articles.summary_zh: Verizon Communications Inc. 週一公佈手機用戶淨增，這是新 CEO Dan Schulman 回奪市場份額策略已見成效的早期信號。

articles.title: China Blocks Meta’s $2 Billion Acquisition of AI Firm Manus
articles.summary: China has decided to block Meta Platforms Inc.’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal that’s drawn fire for the leakage of technology to the US.
articles.title_zh: 中國阻止 Meta 20 億美元收購 AI 公司 Manus
articles.summary_zh: 中國決定阻止 Meta Platforms Inc. 對代理 AI 新創公司 Manus 的 20 億美元收購，此舉旨在打破引發技術洩露至美國的爭議交易。

articles.title: Qualcomm Gains on Report It’s Working With OpenAI on Phone
articles.summary: Qualcomm Inc. shares jumped on Monday after a closely watched tech industry analyst suggested the chipmaker is working with artificial intelligence giant OpenAI on a smartphone.
articles.title_zh: Qualcomm 因傳與 OpenAI 合作開發手機而上漲
articles.summary_zh: 科技業備受關注的分析師暗示 Qualcomm Inc. 正與人工智能巨頭 OpenAI 合作開發智慧型手機，該公司股價週一大幅上漲。

articles.title: Why China’s Affordable AI Is a Worry for Silicon Valley
articles.summary: Chinese AI models are cheaper and more adaptable than the preeminent US platforms, and studies suggest they’re now almost as proficient. How did that happen?
articles.title_zh: 為什麼中國平價 AI 令矽谷擔憂
articles.summary_zh: 中國 AI 模型比美國主流平台更便宜且更具適應性，研究表明它們現在幾乎同樣熟練，這是如何發生的？

articles.title: Emerging Stocks an Even Better Bargain After Best Rally in Years
articles.summary: Emerging-market stocks are rallying three times as fast as US equities this year, and their lead may widen further if relative share valuations are any guide.
articles.title_zh: 新興股票在多年最佳漲幅後變得更便宜
articles.summary_zh: 新興市場股票今年漲幅是美國股票的三倍，相對股價估值暗示其領先優勢可能進一步擴大。

articles.title: Nvidia-Tied Data Center Taps Junk-Debt Market for $4.5 Billion
articles.summary: A data center developer is seeking $4.54 billion in junk-debt financing for an artificial intelligence project tied to Nvidia Corp., testing investor appetite after a recent surge in offerings.
articles.title_zh: 與 Nvidia 相關的數據中心尋求 45 億美元垃圾債務融資
articles.summary_zh: 數據中心開發商為與 Nvidia Corp. 相關的人工智能項目尋求 45.4 億美元垃圾債務融資，測試投資者在近期發行激增後的胃口。

articles.title: EBay Rival Vinted Valued at €8 Billion in Share Transaction
articles.summary: Online retailer Vinted sold shares in a secondary transaction that values the company at €8 billion ($9.4 billion), the company said on Monday.
articles.title_zh: eBay 競爭對手 Vinted 股份交易估值達 80 億歐元
articles.summary_zh: 線上零售商 Vinted 通過次級股份交易完成，公司估值達 80 億歐元（94 億美元）。

articles.title: Singapore Investigates Cybersecurity Incident Involving Government Contractor
articles.summary: Singapore’s Land Transport Authority said it has suspended a government construction contractor’s access to its digital system after the company was involved in a cybersecurity incident, CNA reported.
articles.title_zh: 新加坡調查涉及政府承包商的網路安全事件
articles.summary_zh: 新加坡陸路運輸局表示，在政府建築承包商涉及網路安全事件後，已暫停其對數位系統的訪問權限。

articles.title: Spotify Premium Now Includes Peloton Classes, Marking Push Into Fitness Content
articles.summary: Spotify Technology SA is now offering workout classes from Peloton Interactive Inc. to premium subscribers, marking the music streaming pioneer’s first major foray into fitness content.
articles.title_zh: Spotify Premium 現包含 Peloton 課程，標誌著進軍健身內容
articles.summary_zh: Spotify Technology SA 現向高級訂戶提供 Peloton Interactive Inc. 的健身課程，標誌著音樂串流先驅進入健身內容領域的首次重大舉措。

articles.title: Apollo Backs Dental Firm vVardis at $1 Billion-Plus Value
articles.summary: Apollo Global Management Inc. has invested in vVardis Holding AG, a Swiss dental firm founded by sisters Haley and Goly Abivardi.
articles.title_zh: Apollo 支持牙科公司 vVardis，估值超 10 億美元
articles.summary_zh: Apollo Global Management Inc. 已對瑞士牙科公司 vVardis Holding AG 進行投資，該公司由姐妹花 Haley 和 Goly Abivardi 創辦。

articles.title: Montage Profit Reaches Record as AI Chip Shipments Surge
articles.summary: Montage Technology Co.’s first-quarter profit reached a record, beating estimates, fueled by shipments of chips critical to AI infrastructure.
articles.title_zh: Montage 利潤創新高，AI 芯片出貨激增
articles.summary_zh: Montage Technology Co. 第一季度利潤創歷史新高，超預期，受 AI 基礎設施關鍵芯片出貨推動。

articles.title: CATL Seeks $5 Billion in Largest HK Share Sale of 2026
articles.summary: Contemporary Amperex Technology Co. Ltd. is seeking to raise about $5 billion from a Hong Kong share placement, according to terms of the deal seen by Bloomberg News, in what is the city’s largest offering yet this year.
articles.title_zh: CATL 尋求 50 億美元香港股份發行，創 2026 年最大融資
articles.summary_zh: 當代安培科技有限公司尋求從香港股份配售融資約 50 億美元，據 Bloomberg News 見聞的交易條款，為香港今年最大發行。

articles.title: Nvidia Put in Awkward Spot if Musk’s SpaceX Buys Cursor
articles.summary: Chipmaker is a booster, investor in the AI coding company.
articles.title_zh: 如果馬斯克的 SpaceX 收購 Cursor，Nvidia 將陷入尷尬境地
articles.summary_zh: 晶片製造商是 AI 編程公司 Cursor 的支持者和投資者。

articles.title: Musk and Altman Head to Trial in Feud Over Future of OpenAI
articles.summary: Elon Musk and Sam Altman will face off this week in a trial that could determine the future of OpenAI.
articles.title_zh: 馬斯克和 Altman 就 OpenAI 未來走向對簿公堂
articles.summary_zh: Elon Musk 和 Sam Altman 本週將在庭審中對決，該案可能決定 OpenAI 的未來。

articles.title: China Cancels Meta’s $2 Billion Manus Deal
articles.summary: China has decided to block Meta’s $2 billion acquisition of agentic artificial intelligence startup Manus, sending a chill through China’s burgeoning AI sector and happening weeks before a high-profile summit between US President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. Bloomberg Intelligence's Matt Bloxham explains. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 中國取消 Meta 的 20 億美元 Manus 交易
articles.summary_zh: 中國決定阻止 Meta 對 AI 新創公司 Manus 的 20 億美元收購，此舉將衝擊中國新興 AI 產業，且發生在美國總統 Trump 與中國領導人習近平高層峰會前數週。

articles.title: RBC’s Calvasina Sees US as Global Safety Trade Amid Iran War
articles.summary: Lori Calvasina, head of US equity strategies at RBC, doesn’t see the fallout of the conflict in the Middle East impacting the earnings of the AI and tech trade in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: RBC 的 Calvasina 認為美國是全球避險交易
articles.summary_zh: RBC 美股策略主管 Lori Calvasina 認為中東衝突不會對美國 AI 和科技產業的盈利造成影響。

articles.title: Germany Suspects Russia Behind Cyberattack on Top Officials
articles.summary: German officials suspect Russia is behind a cyberattack that targeted top German decision makers via the Signal messaging app, according to a government official in Berlin.
articles.title_zh: 德國懷疑俄羅斯發動針對高級官員的網路攻擊
articles.summary_zh: 德國官員懷疑俄羅斯是針對德國高層決策者的網路攻擊幕後黑手，該攻擊通過 Signal 通訊應用進行。

articles.title: Meta Seeks to Power Data Centers With Energy Beamed From Space
articles.summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is looking to power artificial intelligence data centers with solar energy collected in space, taking a novel approach to meeting its insatiable demand for electricity.
articles.title_zh: Meta 尋求用太空傳輸的能源為數據中心供電
articles.summary_zh: Meta Platforms Inc. 計劃利用在太空收集的太陽能為 AI 數據中心供電，以滿足其對電力的巨大需求。

articles.title: China Blocks Meta’s Acquisition of AI Startup Manus
articles.summary: China has decided to block Meta's $2 billion acquisition of agentic AI startup Manus, in a surprise move to unwind a controversial deal. The decision is likely to send a chill through China’s AI sector and emerged just weeks before a summit between US President Donald Trump and China’s Xi Jinping. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 中國阻止 Meta 收購 AI 新創公司 Manus
articles.summary_zh: 中國決定阻止 Meta 對 AI 新創公司 Manus 的 20 億美元收購，此舉預計將衝擊中國 AI 產業，且發生在美國總統 Trump 與中國領導人習近平峰會前數週。

articles.title: National Science Board eviscerated; Trump admin fires all 22 members
articles.summary: All 22 members of the National Science Board were terminated by the Trump administration via a terse email Friday. The administration has provided no explanation for purging the board, which helps steer the National Science Foundation and acts as an independent advisory body for the President and Congress on scientific and engineering issues, providing reports throughout the year. The ousters represent another severe blow to the NSF and the overall scientific enterprise in America. On Friday, members received a two-sentence email saying that, "On behalf of President Donald J. Trump," their positions were "terminated, effective immediately." Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 國家科學委員會遭大幅裁撤；Trump 政府解僱全部 22 名成員
articles.summary_zh: Trump 政府在週五通過簡短電子郵件解僱了國家科學委員會的全部 22 名成員，但尚未提供任何解釋。

articles.title: Next El Niño could be tipping point for a hotter climate
articles.summary: The Pacific Ocean is a giant climate cauldron, with a powerful heat engine that affects storms, fisheries, and rainfall patterns half a world away, and scientists are watching closely to see if it’s about to boil over. Their projections suggest the tropical Pacific is simmering toward a strong El Niño , the warm phase of an ocean-atmosphere cycle that can intensify and shift those impacts. In a world already superheated by greenhouse gases, a strong El Niño during the next 12 to 18 months could permanently push the planet’s average annual temperature past the 1.5 degrees Celsius warming threshold enshrined in scientific documents and political agreements as a turning point for potentially irreversible climate impacts. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 下一次厄爾尼諾現象可能成為氣候更熱的轉折點
articles.summary_zh: 太平洋如同一個巨大的氣候熔爐，其強大熱引擎影響著全球風暴、漁業和降雨型態，科學家正密切關注其是否即將沸騰。

articles.title: Gateway manufacturer finally acknowledges issue, fails to mention "corrosion"
articles.summary: One of the more intriguing space stories in a while broke last week when NASA Administrator Jared Isaacman said during a congressional hearing that the two habitation modules built for the Lunar Gateway had been corroded. The immediate response to these comments on Wednesday before a House committee from some space industry observers was doubt—Isaacman, they said , must be lying . However, the primary contractor for the Habitation and Logistics Outpost, Northrop Grumman, soon acknowledged there was a manufacturing irregularity . On Friday the European Space Agency, providing the other habitation module (I-HAB), acknowledged that there had been "corrosion" observed. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 網關製造商終於承認問題，卻未提及「腐蝕」
articles.summary_zh: 上週 NASA 局長 Jared Isaacman 在國會聽證會上表示為月球網關 Gateway 建造的兩個居住艙發生腐蝕，引發了人們對太空項目的關注。

articles.title: Meet the players who lost big money on Peter Molyneux’s failed Legacy
articles.summary: This week, players are being asked to pay $25 for early access to Masters of Albion , a god game throwback that legendary designer Peter Molyneux ( Populous, Dungeon Keeper, Black and White ) says will be the last game he ever works on . But the players who poured roughly $54 million in cryptocurrency into Molyneux’s previous game, Legacy , say they're still bitter about getting swept up in Molyneux’s broken promises of a best-in-class economic simulation and the opportunity for “play to earn” riches. Legacy players who spoke to Ars Technica described pre-purchasing thousands of dollars' worth of NFTs, in some cases, to buy into the crypto-fueled vision offered by Molyneux, his development studio 22cans, and publisher Gala Games. Those players said the Legacy they got was a pale shadow of
articles.title_zh: 認識在 Peter Molyneux 失敗遊戲上損失巨資的玩家
articles.summary_zh: 玩家本週被要求花費 $25 購買傳奇設計師 Peter Molyneux 開發的復古策略遊戲 Masters of Albion 的早期存取，但曾投入約 5,400 萬美元加密貨幣的玩家面臨損失。

articles.title: 【2026 企業資安大調查｜資安人才需求】因應資安人才缺口， 3成CIO想靠AI緩解
articles.summary:
資安人才向來是科技人力中的少數，在法遵要求上市櫃公司都得有一定規模不等的專責資安人力，不能再像過去靠資訊部門兼任之後，過去幾年，資安人才更成了超級搶手的人才，不分產業也都吹起了資安人才荒。
隨著生成式AI的崛起，尤其過去兩年，科技大廠推出的資安AI助手越來越成熟，LLM挖掘軟體系統漏洞的能力也越來越強，生成式AI開始成了提升資安人才戰力的利器。這也讓企業開始意識到，可以運用生成式AI來緩解資安人才不足的壓力。
在去年大調查中，我們開始調查資訊長和資安長對於AI緩解IT人才荒的看法，尤其是資安人才和開發人才缺口的緩解上。

articles.title: 用AI發現漏洞還不夠，Google指出自動化大規模修補才是防禦核心
articles.summary:
將AI用於資安防禦以對抗AI攻擊，已成為各界關注焦點，特別是近期AI在漏洞挖掘能力上的高速推進，然而，AI大廠Google認為，解決資安漏洞風險的關鍵，不只在於大規模「找出」漏洞，更關鍵的是，如何運用AI大規模且高效率地「修補」漏洞。
這樣的論點近期一再被強調。例如，2024年舉行AIxCC準決賽的美國國防高等研究計劃署（DARPA），以及去年宣布正研發AI代理CodeMender的Google，都強調自動發現與自動修補漏洞的重要性，近日Google工程部門副總裁Royal Hansen來臺，揭露自動化防禦的最新發展。

articles.title: LMDeploy LLM推論工具SSRF漏洞公開後13小時內即遭利用
articles.summary: 資安業者Sysdig威脅研究團隊指出，InternLM開發的LMDeploy大型語言模型推論工具，在伺服器端請求偽造（SSRF）漏洞公開後，不到13小時就出現利用嘗試。該漏洞編號為CVE-2026-33626，影響LMDeploy0.12.3之前版本，官方已在0.12.3修補。

articles.title: Anthropic測試Claude Code退出Pro方案，開發者社群質疑定價透明度
articles.summary: Anthropic因Claude Code付費方案標示變動引發開發者社群討論。部分使用者發現，Claude定價頁與支援文件一度顯示Claude Code未列入每月20美元的Pro方案，僅出現在每月100美元起的Max方案，引發外界質疑Anthropic是否未經正式公告就調整開發者工具的付費門檻。Anthropic成長主管Amol Avasare表示，僅針對約2%新專業消費者（prosumer）註冊用戶的小型測試。

articles.title: 資安院首屆漏洞獵捕活動發現20個硬體產品漏洞，今年第二屆活動開放AI工具挖掘軟體漏洞
articles.summary: 為鼓勵國內業者重視產品資安，數發部資安院在去年12月舉辦首屆漏洞獵捕(bug bounty)活動，邀請研華、威強電等11家業者參加，超過20項產品參與，共有179名資安研究人員參與，發現約20個漏洞，資安院為引導資安社群與產業建立機制，今年將舉辦第二屆漏洞獵捕活動，盼喚起業者重視產品資安。

articles.title: CrowdStrike修補LogScale重大漏洞，未更新可能導致遠端讀取任意檔案
articles.summary: 端點防護與雲端資安平臺廠商CrowdStrike近日發布安全公告，修補旗下日誌分析與監控平臺LogScale重大漏洞，一旦該系統暴露在網際網路，遠端攻擊者可利用此漏洞，在未通過身分驗證的狀態下，讀取伺服器檔案系統的任意檔案，CrowdStrike表示尚未發現此漏洞的濫用跡象，但仍建議所有自行建置版用戶升級，以降低攻擊風險。
